indications.text:
Striant™ is indicated for replacement therapy in males for conditions associated with a
deficiency or absence of endogenous testosterone:
Primary hypogonadism (congenital or acquired) – testicular failure due to
cryptorchidism, bilateral torsion, orchitis, vanishing testis syndrome,
orchidectomy, Kl...

Striant® is indicated for replacement therapy in males for conditions associated with a deficiency or
absence of endogenous testosterone:
Primary hypogonadism (congenital or acquired) – testicular failure due to
cryptorchidism, bilateral torsion, orchitis, vanishing testis syndrome,
orchidectomy, Kl...

Striant is indicated for replacement therapy in adult males for conditions associated with a deficiency or absence of
endogenous testosterone:
• Primary hypogonadism (congenital or acquired) – testicular failure due to cryptorchidism, bilateral torsion,
orchitis, vanishing testis syndrome, orchiecto...
